scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,magenta "bun run --cwd backend dev" "bun run --cwd frontend dev"
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd backend test && bun run --cwd frontend lint -- --max-warnings=0 && bun run --cwd frontend test && bun run --cwd frontend build
